Name: Check
Description: Look secretly at a hidden card, copy its points.

Name: Debug
Description: Make another card visible, without playing its effect.

Name: Display
Description: Force a player to attempt to activate a card.

Name: "#[inline]"
Description:
Play hidden.

This can score points while hidden if adjacent techniques are visible.

Name: --generate-link-to-definition
Description: Next player activates a card.

Name: --document-private-items
Description: Get +1 point for each hidden card.

Name: "#[cfg(doc)]"
Description: Play hidden.

Name: "#[must_use]"
Description: If it’s your turn to play, you have to play this.

Name: "#[diagnostic::do_not_recommend]"
Description: Give -1pt to another card, then hide this.

Name: Sized
Description: Guess the total amount of raw points a player has in hand, get -1pt per difference.
Flavor: dyn incompatibility is not object safe

Name: Pin
Description:
Hide a card.

No other cards can be activated while this is visible.

Name: Never
Description:
Play hidden.
Discard if seen.
Just before counting points, you can hide any card.

Name: Shadowing
Description: Hide an allied card, gain its points.

Name: Safety
Description: While visible, you can choose to discard this rather than hiding any card.

Name: expect()
Description: Activate an allied card, on failure, discard this too.

Name: cargo run
Description: Activate an allied card.

Name: match
Description: Name a category, then draw a card. If it matches, play it.
Next player activates a card. If they fail, you activate one of your cards.

Name: lazy_static!
Description:
Play hidden.

Activate this on any future turn to activate another hidden allied card.

Name: impl
Description: Activate a card from your discard pile.

Name: drop()
Description: Discard a visible allied card, draw 2 cards.

Name: collect()
Description: Draw cards until you have 4 in hand.

Name: peekable()
Description: Look at the top 2 cards of your draw pile, put them back in any order.

Name: drain()
Description: Draw a card from an opponent's discard pile.

Name: todo!()
Description: Play hidden. Gets +4pts if still hidden when points are counted.

Name: no_std
Description: Gets -1pt for each visible technique (including opponents').

Name: Atomic
Description: Gets -1pt for each other visible technique you have.

Name: "#[deprecated]"
Description: Next player can choose to discard a visible card to hide this.
